---
title: "Shauna Heron"
subtitle: Graduate Researcher · Experimental Psychology · Health Data Scientist · R Specialist · Clinical Analytics · Human Robot Interaction
description-meta: " "
image: "files/images/me-casual.png"
page-navigation: false
toc: false
#sidebar: false
page-layout: full

about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 70%
  links:
    - icon: robot
      text: Lab
      href: https://www.github.com
      target: _blank
    - text: "{{< ai arxiv >}} arXiv"
      href: https://arxiv.org/search/cs?searchtype=author&query=Heron%2C+S
      target: _blank
    - icon: envelope
      text: E-mail
      href: mailto:sheron@laurentian.ca   
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/shauna-heron-1885247
      target: _blank
    # - icon: youtube
    #   text: YouTube
    #   href: https://www.youtube.com     
      #target: _blank 
    - text: "{{< ai orcid >}} ORCID"   # use academic icons, "" are needed, you also need to install the fontawesome extension
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-9262-6718     
      target: _blank
    # - text: "{{< ai clarivate >}} Web of Science"
    #   href: https://www.webofscience.com  
    #   target: _blank
    # - text: "{{< ai scopus >}} Scopus"
    #   href: https://www.scopus.com
    #   target: _blank
    # - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}} Google Scholar"
    #   href: https://scholar.google.com
    #   target: _blank
#    - text: "{{< ai researchgate >}} Research Gate"
#      href: https://www.researchgate.net
#      target: _blank

listing:   # Comment the listing section and delete corresponding lines in the index.qmd file to remove the recent posts
  - id: recent-posts
    contents: 
      - posts
      - posts/post-links.yml
    exclude:
      title: ""
    type: grid
    max-items: 3
#    image-height: 150px
    page-size: 3 #set same as max-times to remove the page number setting
    fields: [image, date, title, subtitle]
    max-description-length: 75
    sort: 
      - "date desc"
      - "title asc"
---

:::{#hero-heading}

I am a healthcare-focused data scientist and R specialist with hands-on experience building production analytics systems for a mental health organization. Deep expertise in wrangling large, complex electronic health record datasets; developing predictive models; and delivering reproducible reporting workflows that drive clinical decision-making. Graduate training in experimental psychology and machine learning provides both the statistical depth and the domain literacy to work effectively at the intersection of data science and clinical practice.

## Core Skills

**Primary:** R (tidyverse, tidymodels, Quarto, ggplot2, lme4)\
**Secondary:** Python (scikit-learn, Pandas, PyTorch, TensorFlow, Hugging Face, spaCy, Ollama, LangChain)\
**Statistics & Modelling:** Generalized linear and mixed models; Bayesian hierarchical models; supervised and unsupervised machine learning; SHAP-based model interpretability\
**Data:** Electronic health record (EHR) analytics; longitudinal data construction; feature engineering; cohort definition; SQL/SQLite\
**Reporting & Workflow:** Quarto; Shiny; reproducible PDF and HTML reports; Power BI\
**Applied AI:** Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG); LLM integration; vector databases (ChromaDB); Robotics platforms\
**Tools:** Positron, VS Code, Git, NeoVIM, R Studio, Jupyter\
**OS:** Linux/Unix, macOS, Windows\


:::


```{r}
#| echo: false
# <!-- Delete the following section and delete corresponding lines in the yaml part to remove the recent posts -->
# ## Recent Posts
# Check out the latest &nbsp;[Papers](posts.qmd#category=paper)&nbsp;, &nbsp;[News](posts.qmd#category=news)&nbsp;, &nbsp;[Events](posts.qmd#category=event)&nbsp;, and &nbsp;[More »](/posts.qmd)

# :::{#recent-posts}
# :::

#<p align="right">[All Posts »](/posts.qmd)</p>

```
